race.comment: GOLDEN EYES (13) has been just behind the placegetters in both runs since joining the new stable and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Strips fitter third-up from the break and is sure to be ready for the step-up to the mile journey now. Should be right there when the whips are cracking. The well-related HARD KNOX (1) (full to Listed winner and G2 placed Far Too Easy) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in all three outings this campaign and strikes a very winnable contest here. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the outcome. EVENING DELLE (12) gets some weight off from the low draw and may make her presence felt. HAPPY COFFEE (15) next in line in a race with only a handful of chances.
